'''Garrett''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]].

==Biography==
He served in the same unit as [[D'Lew]] and [[Darca Nyl]]. During a [[Battle above spaceport|battle over a spaceport]], his [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpack]] was damaged and he was falling to his death. Nyl hurried to rescue him despite Garrett's protestations. At the last moment, Nyl seized Garrett's hands and carried him from the battlefield, presumably saving his life.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|issue1=21|issue2=24|Nomad}} {{1st}} {{Flash}}
